name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.57: fixes transparent PNGs being padded white and wrongly reported as photo backgrounds. Background detection sampled the image border, but a tall or wide product in a tight crop touches the edges, so the border WAS the product: a clean cut-out was read as non-uniform (needs a replacement image) and as having a background (padded white). Detection now judges by how much of the image is transparent overall, which does not care whether the product touches an edge, and knockout skips images that are already cut out. White-box cleaning and photo/gradient reporting unchanged. Cumulative over v5.56.
